summary: Created batch_meeting_router.py and processed 159 meetings. 152 successfully classified, B36 files written, 48 meetings linked to existing deals.
issues: 7 parse errors from truncated JSON responses (expected with API limits)
deal_activities table schema uses meeting_path not metadata_json - adapted
notes_for_orchestrator: 159 meetings needing routing (vs 327 estimated) - likely previous batch had already processed some. The 7 parse errors are from truncated LLM responses; could be retried but low priority. batch_meeting_router.py uses /zo/ask with 20 concurrent requests - works well. ~$8-10 estimated cost for full run.
